description: The GridMesh component generates a procedural mesh for use with Mesh Renderers that is like a Quad Mesh but has multiple squares instead of being one big square.

fields.Points: how many vertex points should be used on each axis to make the grid of quads
fields.Size: how big the grid is scale wise.
fields.DisplacementMagnitude: How far to displace the grid texture using ``DisplacementTexture``
fields.DisplacementTexture: The texture to use for displacement. must be set to Uncompressed.

usage: Attach to a slot and insert into a MeshRenderer to see the geometry. Don't forget to use a Material.
